# Packrift Exact Attribute Constraint Atlas

A public Packrift attribute-constraint reference built from approved in-stock catalog records. It parses material, color, closure, printer, strength, and pack-count signals so agents and buyers can avoid unsafe substitutions.

Site: https://packrift.github.io/exact-attribute-constraint-atlas/
Generated: 2026-06-02T14:10:13Z
Approved in-stock records: 4,815

## Public entrypoints
- HTML: https://packrift.github.io/exact-attribute-constraint-atlas/
- Sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/exact-attribute-constraint-atlas/sitemap.xml
- Records JSON: https://packrift.github.io/exact-attribute-constraint-atlas/data/attribute-constraint-records.json
- Records CSV: https://packrift.github.io/exact-attribute-constraint-atlas/data/attribute-constraint-records.csv
- Stats JSON: https://packrift.github.io/exact-attribute-constraint-atlas/data/stats.json
- Methodology: https://packrift.github.io/exact-attribute-constraint-atlas/methodology/
- Packrift: https://packrift.com

## Claim boundaries
- Parsed signals are evidence for review, not guaranteed substitute approvals.
- Packrift.com is the source of truth for buying, availability, final price, and freight.
- No supplier cost, margin, private customer, order, cart, credential, token, or payment data is included.

## Data fields
See /data/field-dictionary.csv and /data/schema.json.
